title: BlossomEQ - Swem Tack Addon
description: A star worm equestrian add-on that brings new tack for your horses!
body:
## **BlossomEQ - swem tack add-on**


This mod is made with love for all equestrians and for minecraft servers. Our lovely texture artists Sc4ry, Lisssa and Haku and our programists Tre, Sc4ry made this dream of having more realistic tack come true. Also special thanks to Hayley for creating icons for some of Haku's textures!

In the mod you have everything that you need and even more, we have a big range of colors so everyone can pick their favourites, from light to neons, patterns, quilted or silky. Your horses now can be protected from flies with either a blanket or just a fly mask! You want transport boots or maybe a sheep skin? We got you! Or maybe you'd like some new textures for saddles? Or jumping girths? We have it all!

We also have many new sand and sandstone textures for your arenas!


 

## **Our TOU (terms of use):**


- you **CAN** recolor, change, add anything you want to the textures for _**personal use only**_, but don't forget to tag and credit us in your posts!

- you **CAN'T** make any profit from our textures in any way, or say they are your own! (if you recolor don't try to sell it cause we will sue for plagiarism, our artists worked hard on their textures)

- you **CAN** use the mod on your server and in modpacks.




 
[Join our discord for updates and polls!](https://discord.gg/d9wbKUMq84)
